pytorch_task_v1.prompt_instructions: Implement this ML task as a single self-contained Python file. Include all required functions and a complete main block that trains, evaluates, prints metrics, saves artifacts, and exits with sys.exit(exit_code).
evaluation_rules: The evaluate() function must compute validation metrics appropriate for the task.
The main block must train, evaluate train and validation splits, print metrics, save artifacts, and return non-zero on failed thresholds.
All neural model training must be implemented in PyTorch.

tasks.description: Train a PyTorch MLP on sklearn two-moons data with mixup regularization, AdamW, cosine LR, and gradient clipping.

requirements.data: Use sklearn.datasets.make_moons with noise and an 80/20 stratified split.
requirements.implementation: Use nn.Module MLP, mixup, AdamW, cosine scheduler, and gradient clipping.
requirements.evaluation: Report accuracy, macro-F1, MSE, and R2 against one-hot labels.
requirements.validation: Exit 0 only when validation accuracy and macro-F1 are above 0.94.

tasks.description: Train a compact CNN on generated 16x16 shape images with cutout augmentation and label smoothing.

requirements.data: Generate four classes of synthetic shape images without downloads.
requirements.implementation: Use Conv2d blocks, cutout augmentation, AdamW, cosine LR, and label smoothing cross entropy.
requirements.evaluation: Report accuracy, macro-F1, MSE, and R2 against one-hot labels.
requirements.validation: Exit 0 only when validation accuracy and macro-F1 are above 0.97.

tasks.description: Train a GRU forecaster on synthetic noisy sine-wave windows using OneCycleLR and gradient clipping.

requirements.data: Generate variable-frequency noisy sine windows and predict the next value.
requirements.implementation: Use nn.GRU, AdamW, OneCycleLR, Huber loss, and gradient clipping.
requirements.validation: Exit 0 only when validation R2 is above 0.85 and MSE is below 0.04.

tasks.description: Train a denoising autoencoder on standardized sklearn breast-cancer features with a sparse latent penalty.

requirements.data: Use sklearn.datasets.load_breast_cancer with standardized numeric features.
requirements.implementation: Use encoder-decoder MLP, Gaussian/dropout corruption, AdamW, sparse latent L1 penalty, and ReduceLROnPlateau.
requirements.evaluation: Report reconstruction MSE, MAE, and R2.
requirements.validation: Exit 0 only when validation R2 is above 0.78 and MSE is below 0.22.
